name: Bath & Body Works Inc.
summary: Bath & Body Works, Inc. is a specialty retailer of home fragrance, body care, and soaps & sanitizer products. The company operates through retail stores and online channels, offering a variety of products under the Bath & Body Works brand, and is headquartered in Columbus, Ohio. Bath & Body Works focuses on creating and selling fragrances for the body and home, including candles, lotions, and shower gels.
